description_long: This object consists of three porcelain dolls, each with distinct features and attire, arranged as a group. The central figure is the tallest, dressed in a white kimono adorned with delicate floral and fan motifs, and holds a fan in her right hand. Her face is painted with fine details, including red lips and black eyebrows, and she has long, straight white hair. The doll to the left is smaller, with a rounded face, pink bows in her hair, and a simple white dress with a heart motif. The doll to the right is also small, with a topknot hairstyle, a white robe, and is holding a green book or object. All three dolls have a smooth, matte finish and are painted with subtle pastel colors. The group exudes a traditional Japanese aesthetic, with careful attention to clothing patterns and facial expressions.
description: A group of three porcelain dolls in traditional Japanese attire, featuring detailed painted faces and kimonos with floral and fan motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three dolls, with the central figure in a white kimono holding a fan, flanked by two smaller dolls with distinct hairstyles and accessories.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the central doll and the smaller doll on the right, revealing the depth and layering of their garments.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of all three dolls, showing the hair arrangements and the back details of their kimonos.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the leftmost doll's profile and the central figure's side, with visible hair bows and kimono patterns.
attribute_clothing_style: Traditional Japanese kimono style with floral and fan motifs on the central figure's white kimono, simple white dress with a heart motif on the left doll, and a white robe with a green accessory on the right doll. The garments feature pastel colors and delicate painted patterns.
attribute_pose: The central doll stands upright with both arms bent, right hand holding a fan across the chest. The left doll stands with arms at her sides, while the right doll stands holding a green object in front of her torso. All dolls have straight postures and static poses.
attribute_facial_expression: The central doll has a neutral, serene expression with closed lips and slightly arched eyebrows. The left doll has a gentle, subtle smile, while the right doll's expression is neutral with a calm demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: The central doll has long, straight white hair styled back from the face. The left doll has short, straight white hair with pink bows on each side. The right doll has white hair styled in a topknot bun.
